creator: ard_1@mail.ru
text:
Just to make things clear - the patch proposed in this bug report doesn't include fix from the bug #276758

So we need to get patch from the bug #276758 in to the ports tree first, before attempting an exp-run on the patch proposed in this bug report.

Patch from the bug #276758 can be cleanly applied to the both OpenBLAS version 0.3.25 and version 0.3.26 source code 'cause there were no changes to the drivers/other/dynamic.c code between those two OpenBLAS versions.
